title: `arar #6209
definition:
1) to strip, make bare, strip oneself
    1a) (Qal) to strip, strip oneself
    1b) (Poel) to lay bare
    1c) (Hithpalpel) to be utterly stripped, be utterly laid bare
    1d) (Pilpel) break
